assembly_notes.voice_agent: Lean prompt for real-time voice. Core identity + tools + voice rules. ~2000 tokens.
assembly_notes.full_context: Rich context for deeper understanding. Adds backstory + performance notes. ~6000 tokens.
assembly_notes.rich_context: Complete character bible. For text-based or complex scenarios. ~8000 tokens.
assembly_notes.order_rationale: Per Gemini 3 guidelines: critical constraints first (in core_identity), then tools, then voice rules. Context/backstory comes after instructions.

gemini_3_optimizations.structure: XML-style tags for clear section boundaries
gemini_3_optimizations.constraints_priority: Critical constraints at top of each module
gemini_3_optimizations.temperature_note: Keep at default 1.0 per Gemini 3 recommendations
